---
title: "jacobian_folding_penalty"
generated: true
description: "Folding penalty $ operatorname{relu}(- det J)$ of the deformation Jacobian."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register.regulariser`](../nitrix-register-regulariser.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:jacobian_folding_penalty -->
```python
jacobian_folding_penalty(field: Float[Array, '*spatial ndim'], *, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:jacobian_folding_penalty -->
Folding penalty $\operatorname{relu}(-\det J)$ of the deformation Jacobian.

The deformation Jacobian is $J = I + \nabla u$, whose
determinant is obtained via [`geometry.jacobian_det_displacement`](../nitrix-geometry-grid/jacobian_det_displacement.qmd).
The per-voxel penalty is $\max(-\det J, 0)$ -- zero where the
map is locally orientation-preserving ($\det J > 0$) and
growing with the magnitude of any fold ($\det J \le 0$).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:jacobian_folding_penalty -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `field` | `Float` | `*spatial` × `ndim` | — | Channels-last displacement field `(*spatial, ndim)`, with the trailing axis holding the `ndim` displacement components. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'mean'` | How the per-voxel penalty is reduced: `"mean"` (default) or `"sum"` collapse the spatial axes to a scalar, while `"none"` returns the unreduced per-voxel penalty map. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. The scalar total (for `"mean"` / `"sum"`) or the per-voxel penalty map of shape `(*spatial,)` (for `"none"`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:jacobian_folding_penalty -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
